name: Vistry Group PLC
description: A UK housebuilder transitioning to a partnerships-focused model delivering mixed-tenure housing and urban regeneration. Acquired Countryside Partnerships in 2022.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Completions recovery toward 18k+ from partnerships-led model. Lower ASP than private-focused peers reflecting affordable/social housing mix. Volume growth from local authority frameworks.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Partnerships model has lower but more predictable margins than traditional housebuilding. Countryside integration synergies. Operating margin recovery from FY2024 trough.
assumptions.risks: Partnerships model margin compression, local authority funding dependency, planning delays, execution risk on business model transition, profit warnings in 2024 hit credibility.
assumptions.catalyst: Successful transition to capital-light partnerships model, improved cash generation, margin recovery, housing policy support for affordable homes.
